reviews.comment:
Pretty decent cafe to visit. Liked Global blend coffee

Have been here multiple times. I liked the beverages, ambience & even wi fi 😉

1. I highly recommend their (any) Global blend coffee. Also their breakfast combo is a good deal.
2. Staff is very helpful. Thanks to Manju & other members.

reviewReply.comment: Glad to hear you’ve been enjoying your visits with us. Great to know the Global Blend coffee, breakfast combo, and the ambience made your experience even better. Looking forward to welcoming you again soon.

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/14073247821268226998/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xoa01XSTBaV0ZpVFd0UE1sTjVYM3AyWHpWYVgyYxAB

reviews.comment:
The food, ambience, and service at this establishment were all exceptional. I would like to specifically commend Farad, the cashier, who was incredibly kind and helpful. Despite the store being quite busy, she took the time to guide me through the coffee selection and offered excellent food recommendations.
​I truly appreciate her dedication to providing such high-quality service. It is rare to find staff members willing to go the extra mile during peak hours, and her efforts certainly did not go unnoticed.

reviewReply.comment: Great to hear the food, ambience, and service left such a strong impression. We appreciate you taking the time to share this and hope to see you again soon.

reviews.comment: Had a great time at Coffee Island ☕✨ We tried the Java Chips, Forest Berry Smoothie, and French Butter Croissant — everything tasted good, but the Forest Berry Smoothie was definitely the best pick, super refreshing and perfectly balanced. The croissant was buttery and flaky, and the staff was polite, welcoming, and really helpful, making the whole experience even better.

reviewReply.comment: Great to hear you enjoyed the Java Chip Killer, Forest Berry Smoothie, and French Butter Croissant. The smoothie is definitely a refreshing favourite. Hope to see you again soon for another great coffee break.
